revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:2 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:2月6日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 2월 6일]][[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:二月初六]][[zh:二月初六]]
{{Not to be confused with|February 6|qq=February 6}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=二月初六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 2월 6일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar February|qq=}} '''February 6''' is the 6th day of the month {{ill|February (Lunisolar)|ja|2月 (旧暦)|lt=February (Kisaragi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/February (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 2nd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839|1=senshū}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}. == Events == * {{ill|Tenmei|en|Tenmei|qid=Q1194121|lt=Tenmei|1=Tenmei}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1784|en|1784|qid=Q7752|lt=1784|1=1784}} {{ill|March 26|en|March 26|qid=Q2456|lt=March 26|1=March 26}}) – The Fukuoka Domain’s school, {{ill|Shūyūkan|ja|修猷館|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shūyūkan|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 福岡県立修猷館高等学校|1=Fukuoka Prefectural Shuyukan High School|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q5507694}} (also known as the Higashi Gakumon Keikojo), was opened. == Births == * {{ill|Tenbun|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun|1=Tenmon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q21096812}} 6th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1537|en|1537|qid=Q6461|lt=1537|1=1537}} {{ill|March 17|en|March 17|qid=Q2419|lt=March 17|1=March 17}}) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qid=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}}, a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11545923}}) and {{ill|Kanpaku|ja|関白|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanpaku|1=kampaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1199966}} (also noted as having been born on January 1 in the 5th year of Tenbun). * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|qid=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} 19th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1734|en|1734|qid=Q6977|lt=1734|1=1734}} {{ill|March 10|en|March 10|qid=Q2397|lt=March 10|1=March 10}}) – {{ill|Asada Goryu|en|Asada Goryu|qid=Q720222|lt=Asada Gōritsu|1=Asada Goryu}}, a Rang方医 and astronomer (died {{ill|1799|en|1799|qid=Q7827|lt=1799|1=1799}}). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1818|en|1818|qid=Q6964|lt=1818|1=1818}} {{ill|March 12|en|March 12|qid=Q2402|lt=March 12|1=March 12}}) – {{ill|Matsuura Takeshirō|en|Matsuura Takeshirō|qid=Q11531839|lt=Matsuura Takeshirō|1=Matsuura Takeshirō}}, an explorer who surveyed Ezo (died {{ill|1888|en|1888|qid=Q7829|lt=1888|1=1888}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Chūai|en|Emperor Chūai|qid=Q179971|lt=Chūai Tennō|1=Emperor Chūai}} 9th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|200|en|200|qid=Q23813|lt=200|1=200}} {{ill|March 8|en|March 8|qid=Q2395|lt=March 8|1=March 8}}) – Emperor Chūai, the 14th Emperor of Japan. * {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|qid=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun|1=Kanbun (era)}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1666|en|1666|qid=Q7585|lt=1666|1=1666}} {{ill|March 11|en|March 11|qid=Q2398|lt=March 11|1=March 11}}) – {{ill|Senhime|en|Senhime|qid=Q1147080|lt=Senhime|1=Senhime}}, daughter of Tokugawa Hidetada and wife of Toyotomi Hideyori (as noted in some sources; born {{ill|1597|en|1597|qid=Q6790|lt=1597|1=1597}}). == Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|2|5|2|7|1|6|3|2|0206|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 2월 6일]] [[ja:2月6日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:二月初六]]
[[ar:February 6 (Lunisolar)]]
